title: Radio
description: Individual radio button. For groups, prefer RadioGroup which manages roving tabindex and shares the name attribute automatically.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Three radios sharing the same v-model. Only one can be selected at a time.

description.title: With description
description.desc: Secondary text to add context to each option.
description.freeDesc: For personal use with basic features.
description.proDesc: For small teams with advanced features.

colors.title: Colors
colors.desc: Semantic variants for the checked state.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes to match the form density.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: Disabled state preserving the visual value.

props.modelValue: Selected value of the group (v-model). Compared against value to determine checked.
props.value: Value emitted by this radio when selected.
props.label: Visible label to the right of the control.
props.description: Secondary descriptive text below the label.
props.color: Semantic color applied in the checked state.
props.size: Size of the control and the label.
props.disabled: Disables the radio and prevents interaction.
props.name: HTML name attribute. Inherited automatically when inside a RadioGroup.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when this radio is selected (syncs v-model with its value).
